headline: LASIK Eye Surgery in Chennai
subheadline: AIIMS-trained ophthalmologist Dr. Rajeswari offers safe, evidence-based LASIK evaluation and treatment in KK Nagar, Chennai.
metaDescription: LASIK eye surgery consultation in KK Nagar, Chennai with Dr. Rajeswari. Honest evaluation, no unnecessary procedures. Call or book online.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Honest Suitability Assessment
whyPatientsChoose.description: We tell you clearly if LASIK is right for you -- and what to consider if it isn't.

symptoms: Dependent on glasses or contact lenses

processSteps.title: Comprehensive Evaluation
processSteps.description: Detailed corneal mapping to confirm you're a safe candidate.

processSteps.title: Honest Discussion
processSteps.description: A clear conversation about your results and whether LASIK is truly right for you.

processSteps.title: The Procedure
processSteps.description: If suitable, the laser procedure takes only minutes per eye.

landingFaqs.question: How do I know if I'm a suitable LASIK candidate?
landingFaqs.answer: A detailed evaluation -- including corneal mapping and a check of your overall eye health -- determines this. We won't recommend LASIK without being confident it's right for your eyes.

landingFaqs.question: What happens if LASIK isn't the best option for me?
landingFaqs.answer: We'll tell you clearly, and discuss what alternatives may suit you better. The goal is the right outcome for your eyes, not a specific procedure.

landingFaqs.question: Will I know all my options before deciding?
landingFaqs.answer: Yes. Your evaluation results and the reasoning behind any recommendation are explained clearly, so you can make an informed decision without pressure.

decisionSupport.suitabilityIntro: Not everyone who wants LASIK is a suitable candidate. If LASIK is not the right option for your eyes, we'll tell you that clearly. Factors such as corneal thickness, prescription stability, dry eye disease, and overall eye health all influence whether LASIK is the right option. Our goal is not to recommend surgery to everyone who walks in -- it's to determine whether LASIK is safe, appropriate, and likely to deliver the outcome you expect.
decisionSupport.notSuitableTitle: Common Reasons Someone May Not Be Suitable

doctorsPerspective: Many patients come expecting LASIK specifically. Sometimes LASIK is the right answer, and sometimes another option is safer or more suitable for your particular eyes. My priority isn't to perform a specific procedure -- it's to give you an honest assessment and the right recommendation for your vision, even if that means LASIK isn't it.

learnMoreLink.text: Read our full guide to LASIK
